title: betula pendula var. obscura
intro: Betula pendula var. obscura, also known as the Dark Birch, is a variant of the Silver Birch tree, characterized by its dark gray bark and smaller leaves. The medicinal properties of Betula pendula var. obscura include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and act as an antibacterial agent. This plant has various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. The herbal preparations of Betula pendula var. obscura include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, from colds and flu to skin irritations and wounds.
